column1: # ESP32 GoPro Controller V2 — OTA-capable layout
# Target: ESP32-S3  |  Flash: 8 MB
# Bootloader:      0x000000 – 0x007FFF  (32 KB
# Partition table: 0x008000 – 0x008FFF  (4 KB
# `factory` is the recovery app (sibling project esp32_gopro_canbus_recovery).
# `ota_0` and `ota_1` are the A/B slots for the wireless app — `esp_ota_begin`
#   refuses to write to the running partition
column2: so two slots are needed for

column1: #   in-place upgrades from the wireless app's web UI (docs/design/ota.md §6 / §13).
# `storage` is the LittleFS web UI for the wireless app.
# Free 0x740000 .. 0x800000 (~768 KB) reserved for future use.
# Deviations from docs/design/ota.md §3:
#   - factory grew from 512 KB → 768 KB. WiFi-capable IDF v6 recovery is ~700 KB
#     minimum (libnet80211 + lwIP + libpp alone are ~290 KB).
#   - ota_0 shrank from 1.94 MB → 1.69 MB. Main app is ~1.2 MB; comfortable.
#   - ota_1 added now (§3 deferred it to "future"). Without ota_1
#     from main fails (ESP_ERR_OTA_PARTITION_CONFLICT — can't write the running
#     partition). The 1.69 MB came out of the 2.4 MB future-reserve.
# Name
nvs
otadata
phy_init
factory
ota_0
storage
ota_1
